title: potentilla multifida f. subternata
intro: Potentilla multifida f. subternata, also known as the Fern-leaved Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla multifida f. subternata include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
